recommendations.title: Odd Job
recommendations.overview: An unemployed factory worker takes a job as a hit man to make ends meet.

recommendations.title: A Perfect Plan
recommendations.overview: Successful woman in love tries to break her family curse of every first marriage ending in divorce, by dashing to the altar with a random stranger before marrying her boyfriend.

recommendations.title: A Long Way Down
recommendations.overview: Four lost souls—a disgraced TV presenter, a foul-mouthed teen, an isolated single mother, and a failed musician—decide to end their lives on the same night, New Year's Eve. When this disillusioned quartet of strangers meet unintentionally at the same

recommendations.title: Marry Me, Dude
recommendations.overview: Yassine asks his best friend Fred to marry him in order to avoid deportation...

recommendations.title: The Drama
recommendations.overview: A happily engaged couple is put to the test when an unexpected turn sends their wedding week off the rails.

recommendations.title: 3 Days Max
recommendations.overview: Clumsy policeman Rayane has three days to rescue his kidnapped grandmother from a Mexican cartel.

recommendations.title: My Favourite Cake
recommendations.overview: Mahin lives alone in Tehran since her husband’s death and her daughter’s departure for Europe, until an afternoon tea with friends leads her to break her solitary routine and revitalize her love life.

recommendations.title: Father of the Bride
recommendations.overview: A father comes to grips with his daughter’s upcoming wedding through the prism of multiple relationships within a big, sprawling Cuban-American family.

recommendations.title: Band Baaja Baaraat
recommendations.overview: Shruti and Bittoo decide to start a wedding planning company together after they graduate from university, but romance gets in the way of business.

recommendations.title: Hasee Toh Phasee
